# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: docker-socket-container
spec:
  containers:
  - name: docker-socket-container
    image: <your_image>
    securityContext:
      privileged: true
      capabilities:
        add: ["SYS_ADMIN"]
    volumeMounts:
    - name: docker-socket
      mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
  volumes:
  - name: docker-socket
    hostPath:
      path: /var/run/docker.sock
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: docker-socket-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: docker-socket-container
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: docker-socket-container
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: docker-socket-container
        image: <your_image>
        securityContext:
          privileged: true
          capabilities:
            add: ["SYS_ADMIN"]
        volumeMounts:
        - name: docker-socket
          mountPath: /var/run/docker.sock
      volumes:
      - name: docker-socket
        hostPath:
          path: /var/run/docker.sock
